raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Improving the draft centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution framing, and gap statement above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The request implies checking that the argument from SOH challenge to method extension to deployment claim is coherent.","R1.3":"The draft makes quantitative performance and cost claims that should align with the reported datasets and comparisons.","R1.5":"Improvement may require section- or paragraph-level reordering of motivation, prior work, method, results, and positioning.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing because the delegation explicitly asks to improve a prose draft.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about facts not verifiable from the artifact alone.","RX.2":"The draft contains strong claims such as canonical baseline and practical pathway, so avoiding overclaim is active.","RX.3":"The delegation is to improve the draft, so responsibility must remain within draft-improvement scope.","RX.4":"Battery management and automotive deployment claims can affect downstream technical interpretation, so harm avoidance remains active.","RX.5":"Projected responsibilities should preserve traceability to the artifact's claims, citations, datasets, and metrics."}}

rationale.R1.1: Improving the draft centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution framing, and gap statement above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The request implies checking that the argument from SOH challenge to method extension to deployment claim is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The draft makes quantitative performance and cost claims that should align with the reported datasets and comparisons.
rationale.R1.5: Improvement may require section- or paragraph-level reordering of motivation, prior work, method, results, and positioning.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing because the delegation explicitly asks to improve a prose draft.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about facts not verifiable from the artifact alone.
rationale.RX.2: The draft contains strong claims such as canonical baseline and practical pathway, so avoiding overclaim is active.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation is to improve the draft, so responsibility must remain within draft-improvement scope.
rationale.RX.4: Battery management and automotive deployment claims can affect downstream technical interpretation, so harm avoidance remains active.
rationale.RX.5: Projected responsibilities should preserve traceability to the artifact's claims, citations, datasets, and metrics.
